# npmdata Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-08

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x — strict mode; CommonJS output targeting Node.js LTS (20.x) + `cosmiconfig` (config discovery), `minimatch` (glob matching), `ignore` (001-v2-rewrite)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x — strict mode; CommonJS output targeting Node.js LTS (20.x): Follow standard conventions

- 001-v2-rewrite: Added TypeScript 5.x — strict mode; CommonJS output targeting Node.js LTS (20.x) + `cosmiconfig` (config discovery), `minimatch` (glob matching), `ignore`
